001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.service.database;
002
003import androidx.room.Database;
004import androidx.room.RoomDatabase;
005import androidx.room.TypeConverter;
006import androidx.room.TypeConverters;
007import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.dao.BatchDao;
008import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.dao.CandlingObservationDao;
009import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.dao.EggDao;
010import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.dao.EggGroupDao;
011import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.dao.IncubatorDao;
012import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity.Batch;
013import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity.CandlingObservation;
014import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity.Egg;
015import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity.EggGroup;
016import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity.Incubator;
017import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.pojo.BatchWithIncubator;
018import java.time.Instant;
019import java.time.LocalDate;
020
021/**
022 * Main Room database for the Pip Pip Hooray application.
023 *
024 * <p>This database stores batches, incubators, egg groups, eggs, and candling
025 * observations, and exposes DAO access methods for each entity type.
026 */
027@TypeConverters(PipPipDatabase.Converters.class)
028@Database(
029    entities = {
030        Egg.class,
031        EggGroup.class,
032        Batch.class,
033        Incubator.class,
034        CandlingObservation.class
035    },
036    views = {
037        BatchWithIncubator.class
038    },
039    version = PipPipDatabase.VERSION
040)
041public abstract class PipPipDatabase extends RoomDatabase {
042
043  static final String NAME = "pip_pip_hooray_db";
044  static final int VERSION = 3;
045
046  /**
047   * Returns the DAO used for batch persistence operations.
048   *
049   * @return batch DAO.
050   */
051  public abstract BatchDao getBatchDao();
052
053  /**
054   * Returns the DAO used for candling observation persistence operations.
055   *
056   * @return candling observation DAO.
057   */
058  public abstract CandlingObservationDao getCandlingObservationDao();
059
060  /**
061   * Returns the DAO used for egg persistence operations.
062   *
063   * @return egg DAO.
064   */
065  public abstract EggDao getEggDao();
066
067  /**
068   * Returns the DAO used for egg-group persistence operations.
069   *
070   * @return egg-group DAO.
071   */
072  public abstract EggGroupDao getEggGroupDao();
073
074  /**
075   * Returns the DAO used for incubator persistence operations.
076   *
077   * @return incubator DAO.
078   */
079  public abstract IncubatorDao getIncubatorDao();
080
081  /**
082   * Type converters used by Room for unsupported Java time types.
083   */
084  public static class Converters {
085
086    /**
087     * Converts an {@link Instant} to epoch milliseconds for database storage.
088     *
089     * @param value instant value to convert.
090     * @return epoch milliseconds, or {@code null} if the input is null.
091     */
092    @TypeConverter
093    public static Long toLongFromInstant(Instant value) {
094      return (value != null) ? value.toEpochMilli() : null;
095    }
096
097    /**
098     * Converts stored epoch milliseconds to an {@link Instant}.
099     *
100     * @param value epoch milliseconds value.
101     * @return instant represented by the value, or {@code null} if the input is null.
102     */
103    @TypeConverter
104    public static Instant toInstant(Long value) {
105      return (value != null) ? Instant.ofEpochMilli(value) : null;
106    }
107
108    /**
109     * Converts a {@link LocalDate} to epoch-day form for database storage.
110     *
111     * @param value local date to convert.
112     * @return epoch day value, or {@code null} if the input is null.
113     */
114    @TypeConverter
115    public static Long toLong(LocalDate value) {
116      return (value != null) ? value.toEpochDay() : null;
117    }
118
119    /**
120     * Converts an epoch-day value to a {@link LocalDate}.
121     *
122     * @param value epoch-day value.
123     * @return local date represented by the value, or {@code null} if the input is null.
124     */
125    @TypeConverter
126    public static LocalDate toLocalDate(Long value) {
127      return (value != null) ? LocalDate.ofEpochDay(value) : null;
128    }
129  }
130
131}
